zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Umfreville於1030年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian22歲，母親Baroness Mary Redesdale25歲。他去世於1086年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Umfreville was born in 1030, in Normandy, France, his father, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, was 22 and his mother, Baroness Mary Redesdale, was 25. He died in 1086, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Umfreville est né en 1030, à Normandie, France, son père, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Baroness Mary Redesdale, avait 25 ans. Il est décédé en 1086, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Umfreville 1030 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian 22 und seine Mutter Baroness Mary Redesdale 25. Er starb 1086 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Umfreville è nato il nel 1030 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Mary Redesdale, aveva 25 anni. Morì nel 1086, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Umfrevilleが1030年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vianは22歳，母Baroness Mary Redesdaleは25歳であった。彼は1086年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Umfreville(이)가 1030년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Mary Redesdale(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1086년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Umfreville nasceu em 1030, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Mary Redesdale, tinha 25 anos. Ele faleceu em 1086, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Umfreville родился в 1030 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Mary Redesdale, 25. Он умер в 1086 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Umfreville nació en 1030, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Baroness Mary Redesdale, tenía 25 años. Murió en 1086, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
